name: manage_synonyms
description: Create, list, or delete synonyms for an Algolia index. Synonyms ensure that alternative terms (e.g. 'phone' and 'mobile') return the same results. Supports regular (two-way) synonyms, one-way synonyms, and placeholder synonyms for pattern-based expansions.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: The name of the index to manage synonyms for.

parameters.name: synonyms
parameters.description: Array of synonym objects. Each must have 'objectID', 'type' (synonym, oneWaySynonym, placeholder), and type-specific fields.

parameters.name: replaceExistingSynonyms
parameters.description: If true, replaces all existing synonyms. If false, adds to existing ones.
